name: Agent Receipts
description: Cryptographically signed audit trail for agent actions

keyPath.description: Path to Ed25519 key pair JSON file

taxonomyPath.description: Path to custom taxonomy mapping JSON

parameterDisclosure.description: Selectively disclose action parameters in receipts. Disclosed values are signed and durable — never include secrets.

enabled.label: Enable Attestations
enabled.help: Generate signed receipts for every tool call

parameterDisclosure.label: Parameter Disclosure
parameterDisclosure.help: Disclose specific action parameters in receipts. false = hashes only (default), true = all, "high" = high-risk only, or an array of action type strings. Disclosed values are signed and permanent — do not list fields that may contain secrets.
